recipe: To make bupleurum chinense glycerite for medicinal use, first harvest the roots of Bupleurum chinense and dry them thoroughly to preserve their medicinal properties. Then, use a glycerin-based solvent to extract the active compounds from the dried roots, taking care to follow proper extraction procedures to avoid contamination or over-extraction. Finally, filter and bottle the resulting glycerite, which can be used as a tincture for medicinal purposes under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
